name: Hungarian Poppy Seed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk over medium heat, but do not boil.
2. Stir in poppy seeds; set aside.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
4. In another bowl, cream together butter, lemon rind or extract, and maple syrup.
5. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients until well combined.
6. Add the poppy seed/milk mixture and blend thoroughly.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto un-oiled cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes.
